error_signature: cannot access set node within a real execution
title: Set node not accessible in workflow execution
symptom: The workflow fails to access the set node during execution, leading to errors when trying to reference its variables.
applies_when: Using a set node in the workflow
not_this_if: Set node is directly connected to the AI Agent node
root_cause: In n8n, nodes can only access data from directly connected predecessors. If a set node is not directly connected to the AI Agent node, its variables cannot be referenced, causing execution errors.
fix_steps: Ensure the set node is directly connected to the AI Agent node in the workflow.
Use the correct syntax to reference the WhatsApp trigger node, such as {{ $(‘Receptor de chate’).item.json.message[0].text.body }}.
agent_instruction: Rearrange the workflow to connect the set node directly to the AI Agent node.
